---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What pain point are you trying to solve? Is your feature related to a problem? Please describe.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you considered? Why is your proposal better?

## Tradeoffs

Any performance, complexity, or privacy implications? E.g.:
- Does it require sending data to a new third party?
- Does it break the "local-first" principle?
- Does it significantly increase RAG/memory storage?

## Mockups / examples

If applicable, add mockups, example dialog, or screenshots.

## Priority

How important is this to you?

- [ ] Blocking my use of the project
- [ ] Would be very nice to have
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Just an idea

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR
- [ ] I'd need help implementing this
- [ ] Just suggesting
